$schema_comment: UI empty-state preset catalog for imagine-empty. Each preset declares a base prompt, motif hints (NOT hard-fixed images), aspect preference, and preset-specific negatives. Light/Dark pairs are generated by SEPARATE model calls — never color-invert a single render. PRs should keep prompts free of text, logos, faces, and mascot characters.

no-result.label: 검색 결과 없음
no-result.prompt_base: minimalist illustration of an empty box with a magnifying glass, clean line art, single duotone accent, centered, transparent background
no-result.negative_extra: white background, cute mascot, cartoon character, kawaii, text, 404 sign

error-404.label: 404 / 경로 없음
error-404.prompt_base: friendly abstract illustration of a disconnected plug or lost path, neutral mood, clean line art, single duotone accent, centered, transparent background
error-404.negative_extra: 404 sign with number, literal error code, cute mascot, kawaii

error-500.label: 500 / 서버 오류
error-500.prompt_base: calm abstract illustration of gears pausing or steam release, not alarming, clean line art, single duotone accent, centered, transparent background
error-500.negative_extra: flames, skull, alarming red, cute mascot

offline.label: 오프라인 / 네트워크 끊김
offline.prompt_base: quiet illustration of a tethered kite drifting or cloud with broken string, minimal line art, single duotone accent, centered, transparent background
offline.negative_extra: wifi icon with X, literal symbol, cute mascot

no-permission.label: 권한 없음
no-permission.prompt_base: polite illustration of a closed gate with a small key beside it, neutral tone, line art, single duotone accent, centered, transparent background
no-permission.negative_extra: angry face, stop sign, blood red, cute mascot

success.label: 작업 성공
success.prompt_base: subtle illustration of a settled paper plane on a flag or small sprout, optimistic but restrained, line art, single duotone accent, centered, transparent background
success.negative_extra: confetti explosion, medal, trophy, cute mascot

loading-wait.label: 로딩 / 대기
loading-wait.prompt_base: soft illustration of orbiting dots around a paused hourglass or single slow ripple, line art, single duotone accent, centered, transparent background
loading-wait.negative_extra: spinner icon, loading bar, cute mascot

onboarding-step.label: 온보딩 단계
onboarding-step.prompt_base: gentle illustration of a path with a lit lamp post marking the next step, minimal line art, single duotone accent, centered, transparent background

common_negative: text, letters, typography, numbers, logo text, watermark, cute mascot, cartoon character, kawaii, chibi, photorealistic, photo of people, gradient blur of faces
light_mode_cues: soft off-white strokes on transparent background, gentle duotone accent, subtle warm highlights, neutral mood
dark_mode_cues: bright light strokes on transparent background, vibrant duotone accent, gentle cool highlights, neutral mood
